framework.name: GOVERN as Cross-Cutting vs Sequential Gate
framework.description: GOVERN is 'designed to be a cross-cutting function to inform and be infused throughout the other three functions' — not a prerequisite gate. This means governance (including measurement governance) runs parallel to deployment, not before it. There is no phase where measurement must be established before proceeding.
framework.raw_quote: GOVERN applies to all stages of organizations' AI risk management processes and procedures

source.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
